description:
Hi team,

Emma here. I've been trying to log in to the online booking portal at Lakewood Family Dentistry to schedule a cleaning, but the page keeps showing a 'session expired' error after I enter my credentials. I've tried two different browsers and clearing my cache. Could someone help me get access?

Thanks,
Emma
subject: Patient unable to access online booking portal

description:
Hi team,

Mike here. I received an Explanation of Benefits from my insurance showing a different amount than what was charged at my June 3rd cleaning. It looks like the claim was filed under a different procedure code than what was performed. Can someone from billing review and resubmit if needed?

Thanks,
Mike
subject: Billing question — insurance claim for cleaning on June 3

description:
Hi team,

Linda here. I have an appointment scheduled for July 8 at 10:00 AM for a routine cleaning, but I have a conflict that just came up. I'd like to reschedule to any available time during the week of July 14. Please let me know what slots are open.

Thanks,
Linda
subject: Request to reschedule appointment for July 8

description:
Hi team,

Rose here. I'm interested in teeth whitening and would like to understand what options Lakewood offers — in-office treatment vs. take-home trays. Can someone share pricing and estimated results for each? Also wondering if there are any contraindications given that I have a few existing crowns.

Thanks,
Rose
subject: Question about whitening treatment options

description:
Hi team,

Jake here. I got a voicemail reminder about my upcoming exam but I never received the email confirmation that was supposed to be sent. I want to make sure my appointment on June 25 at 2:00 PM is still on the books. Could you confirm and resend the email confirmation?

Thanks,
Jake
subject: Appointment confirmation email not received

description:
Hi team,

Tyler here. My dentist recommended a fluoride treatment at my last visit, but the front desk mentioned it might not be covered under my plan. Can someone verify my coverage and let me know if fluoride is included, or if I'd need to pay out of pocket? I'm on the Delta Dental PPO plan.

Thanks,
Tyler
subject: Coverage question — fluoride treatment under Delta Dental PPO

description:
Hi team,

Diane here. I was recently fitted for a custom nightguard and picked it up last week. However, the guard feels very tight on my upper left molars and is causing some discomfort when I wake up. I'd like to schedule a brief adjustment appointment as soon as possible.

Thanks,
Diane
subject: Nightguard fitting adjustment needed

description:
Hi team,

Chris here. I received my Explanation of Benefits and noticed I was charged for a full series of X-rays, but I had bitewing X-rays taken less than 12 months ago at a different provider. I believe my insurance plan requires a waiting period and should not have billed for the full series. Could you review the claim and advise?

Thanks,
Chris
subject: X-ray billing dispute — duplicate X-rays within 12-month period
